free_text: Triton emission in the interactions of fast
53MeV deuterons on a 1cm thick Be target.
The neutron spectrum extended from 11.5 to 43.5
MeV with maximum intensity at 22.5MeV and FWHM of
Details are given in J.Inorg Nucl Chem,36,3639,
